code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut start = -1
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start >= 0
    let tok = string.substring(s, start, n)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sorted_insert(_ xs: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  for x in xs
    if not inserted and v < x
      out = list.push(out, v)
      inserted = true
    end
    out = list.push(out, x)
  end
  if not inserted
    out = list.push(out, v)
  end
  out
end

fn sort_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  for x in xs
    out = sorted_insert(out, x)
  end
  out
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  for x in a
    if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(out, x)
      out = list.push(out, x)
    end
  end
  out
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)
let inter = intersect(a, b)
let result = sort_list(inter)

let n = list.len(result)
if n == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut s = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let v = match list.get(result, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if i == 0
      s = "#{v}"
    else
      s = "#{s} #{v}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(s)
end
